absorption: Strong BID absorption at vPOC. A large negative delta of -86 is being absorbed by passive buyers, preventing the price from falling.
dom_observation: Significant ask liquidity is stacked at 62200 (509 lots), acting as the first major resistance. Aggressive selling is being absorbed at current levels.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC seviyesinde agresif satis baskisina (buyuk negatif delta) ragmen dusmeyi reddediyor; bu durum, guclu pasif alicilarin satislari absorbe ettigini gosteren net bir long sinyalidir.
